content.en:
this day.

The high-rise of the nine-story building decided to make the truncated Yellow Building into a truncated Xuanlou, and this news shocked many Dao ancestors of the nine-story building.

After all, if you want to supply a Xuanlou, at least it must be a Xuan-level regional boundary!

At present, the truncated zone boundary is not enough to build a truncated Xuanlou.

However, the upper floors of the nine-story building are well aware of the high potential to cut off the boundaries of the district, so they are qualified to set up a Xuanlou, and even have the opportunity to become an underground or even sky tower in the future.

With the current growth rate of the Truncated Boundary, a Xuanlou can be built.

And to build a Xuanlou, there are a lot of resources invested in the early stage.

First of all, the construction cost of the Xuanlou itself is very high, and it also has to be arranged enough to resist the formation of the Ninefold Ancestor, as well as the consumption of resources required to maintain the formation.

And to build the Xuanlou, the most basic requirements are a half-step nine-fold ancestral building owner and three deputy building owners.

The Nine-Story Building does not specify the candidate for the owner, any half-step Nine-Fold Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building is qualified to compete, and even the peak powerhouse of the Eight-Fold Ancestor is qualified to compete, provided that the strength is enough.

If you don't have the strength, you can't become the master of the Xuanlou.

And the truncated Xuanlou is in the truncated Black Mountain, and the truncated Black Mountain contains a great secret, plus the truncated district boundary has the hope of becoming a heaven-level regional boundary in the future, so there are many half-step nine-fold ancestors who want to become the truncated Xuanlou.

Similarly, there are many Dao Ancestors who have cut off the position of the deputy owner of the Xuanlou.

......

"Cut off the Xuanlou, the position of the deputy owner!"

Ye Tian also set his sights on this position.

First of all, once you become the deputy owner of the truncated Xuanlou, you can get a lot of resource rewards at once.

And many treasure lands are only open to positions above the Xuan-level landlord or deputy landlord, and other Dao ancestors are not eligible to enter, no matter how evil they are.

Once he becomes the deputy owner of the truncated Xuanlou, his cultivation will definitely improve very quickly.

So, Ye Tian also signed up to compete for the deputy landlord.

As for the position of the landlord, he didn't have the heart to fight for it.

Although his strength was already comparable to the powerful Half-Step Ninefold Ancestor, and he might not even be his opponent, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor could only be regarded as average among the Half-Step Ninefold Ancestor.

After all, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor did not even condense the immeasurable will, and even the Immeasurable Dao did not fully comprehend it, but only condensed the prototype of the Immeasurable Dao at the peak of Dacheng, and it was still one step away from the true Immeasurable Dao.

And some of the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestors have comprehended the true Infinite Dao and mastered the Infinite Dao Control Technique, which is much stronger than the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, Ye Tian would not be arrogant enough that he could match those top half-step ninefold ancestors.

......

"Endless Dao Ancestor actually signed up for the competition to cut off the position of deputy building master of Xuanlou!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor was a little surprised when he saw this application.

But after thinking about it carefully, Ye Tian had already condensed the Infinite Dao Domain, even if his cultivation was still in the early stage of the Eightfold Ancestor, his combat power was still very terrifying.

However, he felt that Ye Tian was not necessarily comparable to the incomparably demonic Eightfold Ancestor peak powerhouses in the Nine-Fold Building.

Some of the eightfold ancestor peak powerhouses in the Nine-Story Building, whose life level has reached more than fifty, although they have not condensed the immeasurable will, they have the real immeasurable dao, and they have also mastered the immeasurable dao control technique, coupled with the advantage of cultivation, their combat power is extremely terrifying.

This time, there were as many as five people who were such a demonic Eightfold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouse and applied for competition to cut off Xuanlou, so he felt that Ye Tian had little hope.

Unless Ye Tian's cultivation could be immediately promoted to the middle stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, then there would be any hope of competing for the position of the three deputy building masters.

In the following days, the Nine-Fold Building was making every effort to build the Truncated Xuanlou, and even sent several Ninefold Ancestors who were good at arranging arrays and refining weapons to come over to build the Truncated Xuanlou.

And the competition for the number of the owner and deputy owner of the Xuanlou is about to begin.

this day.

Ye Tian received a notice, and the battle for the number of deputy owners of the Xuanlou began, and it was carried out in the Jiuchen Heavenly Tower of the Nine-Story Building.

So, Ye Tian and the Dao Ancestors who signed up went to the Jiuchen Heavenly Tower.

Dove Tower.

Ye Tian came in here, waited for some time, and then ushered in the competitive assessment.

The so-called assessment is very simple, that is, to compete in strength, and the three most powerful Eightfold Origin Ancestors Peak Dao Ancestors are qualified to be ranked as the deputy master of the Truncated Xuanlou.

Somewhere in the Jiuchen Heavenly Tower, Ye Tian appeared here, he was about to fight with an eightfold ancestor peak powerhouse, and the whole process was watched by the ninefold origin ancestor, and there was even a number of ninefold origin ancestor peak powerhouses paying attention.

Once life and death are separated, there will be a Ninefold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouse to make a move, ensuring that no one will really die.

The number of Dao Ancestors who participated was not much, only more than a hundred, after all, Dao Ancestors who had no strength would not come to sign up, knowing that they would not be able to obtain the quota of the deputy owner of the Xuanlou Building, and still participated, wouldn't it be a shame!

Soon, Ye Tian's opponent also appeared.

Ye Tian didn't know each other, after all, there were too many eightfold ancestors in the Nine-Story Building, so if they didn't make contact, they naturally didn't know each other.

However, from the results of the copy talent exploration, Ye Tian knew the name of the other party.

"Golden Silk Dao Ancestor!"

Of course, Ye Tian only knew the name of the other party, and it was not clear what the strength of the other party was.

And in the depths of the Jiuchen Heavenly Tower, a group of Ninefold Origin Ancestors were watching the battle.

"Endless Dao Ancestor and Golden Silk Dao Ancestor, who do you think will win?"

"It should be the Golden Silk Dao Ancestor, after all, the Golden Silk Dao Ancestor's cultivation has reached the peak of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, and he has also comprehended the Infinite Dao and mastered the Infinite Dao Control Technique, although the Endless Dao Ancestor is also very demonic, but after all, the cultivation is too low, and he should not be the opponent of the Golden Silk Dao Ancestor for the time being!"

"I also think it's the Golden Silk Dao Ancestor, the Golden Silk Dao Ancestor is on the list of our Nine-Story Building Eightfold Ancestors, ranking thirty-sixth, but it's not an ordinary Eightfold Ancestor!"

"I think it should be the Endless Dao Ancestor, his strength can't just be based on cultivation!

There were very few Ninefold Origin Ancestors who knew Ye Tian's true strength, except for the Nine Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building and the Stone Chaos Origin Ancestors, the other Ninefold Origin Ancestors did not get the news, because the news was completely blocked.

Therefore, these Ninefold Origin Ancestors were not optimistic about Ye Tian.

Originally, the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building didn't want Ye Tian to sign up to show his strength, but even if he really exposed it after thinking about it carefully, as long as Ye Tian stayed in the Truncated Xuanlou, there would be no big problem.

So, they allowed Ye Tian to participate.

That's when the battle began!

Ye Tian instantly cast the Immeasurable Dao Domain, because if he didn't go out of the Immeasurable Dao Domain, it would be difficult for him to defeat the Golden Silk Dao Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

The Infinite Dao Domain descended and directly suppressed the Golden Silk Dao Ancestor.

"Infinite Dao Domain !!!"

The Golden Silk Dao Ancestor was stunned, and those Ninefold Origin Ancestors who were watching the battle were also shocked.
